subject: Re:
body:
All the rest of PB furniture I believe is accounted for (minus the few items that I kept in storage) in as much as it was sold and you received payment from  co. Called True Treasures for it..
I still am keeping all the books for all houses w/furniture  + recent purchases along christies sold book..the only pieces that are hard to track and put a value on are Leahs :) - any watches you bought or got recently I should add to insurance?
------Original Message------
From: Epstein, Jeffrey
To: G, G
Sent: 15 Feb 2008 06:03
Subject: Re:

I wouold like to know what happened to all the furniture.. , don't worry, 

----- Original Message ----
From: gmax <gmax1@ellmax.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, February 14, 2008 9:55:41 PM
Subject: 

Hey, the chandalier from PB has vanished - the one you liked and that  
was valuable - I am so sorry..it is missing along with the lucite  
desk that used to be in my office. I am very upset as I know that you  
liked it and wanted it put up, and that you said it was v valuable. I  
had Doug go through all the storage units today to finally say once  
and for all that it is gone. Should I claim for it on insurance along  
with the desk?
I am sorry






Thx

G
